overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through a dark forest at night. The character approaches and passes an NPC holding a torch, creating a moment of warm light in the cool-toned woodland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with flowering trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt is jogging steadily along a dirt path through the dark forest, swords visible on his back

tree with white blossoms visible against the dark night sky
tall green grass lining the left side of the path
tall green grass lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs through a dark forest at night, following a narrow dirt path lined with tall grass. Flowering trees with white blossoms are visible in the dim moonlight, creating a serene but ominous atmosphere.

events.description: warm orange torch light becomes visible ahead in the darkness
character passes the stationary torch-bearing NPC on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues jogging forward, approaching and passing a figure holding a torch that illuminates the path

notable_agents.action: standing still on the path holding a lit torch, casting warm orange light on the surroundings

entered.detail: warm orange glow from a torch visible in the distance against the dark forest
silhouetted figure standing in the path holding a lit torch

segments.scene_description: As Geralt runs deeper into the forest, a warm torch light appears ahead. He approaches a stationary NPC holding a torch, passes them on the right, and continues into the darkness as the torch light fades behind him.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit forest that briefly transitions from cool darkness into a pocket of warm light. It begins with Geralt running along a narrow dirt path lined with tall grass and white flowering trees under a dim, ominous sky. As he pushes deeper into the woodland, a warm glow emerges ahead, shifting the color palette from deep blues to amber. The camera then passes a stationary NPC holding a torch, momentarily bathing the scene in light before Geralt continues forward. Finally, the warmth recedes as the character moves back into the enveloping darkness of the forest.
